title: LinkedIn Is Corporate TikTok and You Fell For It
preview_text:
"I’m humbled to announce that I’ve accepted a position as Head of Absolutely Nobody Cares."
LinkedIn has become the most delusional place on the internet. And that’s saying something considering

title: The Gender Divide Reshaping Social Media—And Why It Matters for the Future of News
preview_text: @X is now 64% male. Since @elonmusk's acquisition in October 2022, an estimated one-third of women have left the platform -- making X the most gender-imbalanced major social network in modern history.
